title: Preserving the Josephson Coupling of Twisted Cuprate Junctions via Tailored Silicon Nitride Circuits Boards

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports an experimental cryogenic dry-transfer and contact-engineering method to fabricate high-quality twisted BSCCO Josephson junctions with preserved superconducting coupling and improved reproducibility.
